texto: I'm in love with a girl who knows me better.Fell for the woman just when I met her.Took my sweet time when I was bitter.Someone understands,She knows how treat a fella right.Give me that feeling every night,She wants show love when I wanna fight,Now someone understand me.
explicacao: Citação de Juxtaposition sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “I'm in love with a girl who knows me better.Fell for the woman just when I met her.Took my sweet …” articula amor, love, music em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como boa-noite e reflexao-noturna.
